title: Relay: merchant wallet config — DFVK loading into AppState
description:
Add merchant wallet support to the relay: load DFVK from env, open wallet DB, store both in AppState.

What: relay operator configures MERCHANT_DFVK (128-byte hex) and MERCHANT_WALLET_DB (SQLite path) env vars; relay loads them at startup.

Algorithm:
1. In relay/Cargo.toml, add nie-wallet as workspace dependency.
2. In relay/src/state.rs, add field merchant: Option<MerchantWallet> to Inner, where:
   struct MerchantWallet {
       dfvk: SaplingDiversifiableFvk,
       wallet_store: WalletStore,
       network: ZcashNetwork,
   }
3. In relay/src/main.rs: read MERCHANT_DFVK (256-char hex string, skip if absent), MERCHANT_WALLET_DB (path, default 'merchant-wallet.db'), MERCHANT_NETWORK (mainnet/testnet, default testnet).
4. Parse MERCHANT_DFVK: hex-decode to [u8; 128], call SaplingDiversifiableFvk::from_bytes().  Return Err if not exactly 256 hex chars or from_bytes returns None.
5. Open WalletStore::new(merchant_wallet_db_path). Call ensure_account(0).
6. Construct MerchantWallet { dfvk, wallet_store, network } and pass to AppState::new().
7. If MERCHANT_DFVK is absent, merchant = None (relay runs without subscription payment support — existing behavior).

Defensive rules:
- NEVER log the DFVK bytes or the hex string (it is key material — anyone with it can derive the IVK and watch all payments).
- Log only: 'merchant wallet loaded for network {network}' at info level.
- Error on invalid MERCHANT_DFVK format must be descriptive without echoing the value.
- SaplingDiversifiableFvk does not implement Debug — do not add it.

Tests:
- Unit: parse valid MERCHANT_DFVK hex succeeds.
- Unit: parse wrong-length MERCHANT_DFVK returns descriptive Err.
- Unit: absent MERCHANT_DFVK leaves merchant = None; relay starts normally.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-relay succeeds; relay starts with and without MERCHANT_DFVK set
